text:
GG0130C3_TOILT_ABILITY_END_CD GG0130C3 Discharge Performance Toileting Hygiene Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's ability with toileting hygiene at the time of discharge. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's ability with toileting hygiene at the time of discharge. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate assistance
04 = Supervision or touching assistance
05 = Setup or clean-up assistance
06 = Independent
07 = Patient
